sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْأَسْوَاقُ الشَّعْبِيَّةُ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ مَرَاكِزَ حَيَوِيَّةً لَيْسَتْ لِلتِّجَارَةِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ لِتَبَادُلِ الثَّقَافَاتِ وَالتَّقَالِيدِ الْأَصِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalne tržnice u arapskom svijetu smatraju se vitalnim centrima ne samo za trgovinu, već i za razmjenu kultura i autentičnih tradicija.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional markets in the Arab world are considered vital centers not only for trade but for the exchange of cultures and authentic traditions.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَتَجَوَّلُ الزَّائِرُ بَيْنَ مَمَرَّاتِهَا الضَّيِّقَةِ، تَسْتَقْبِلُهُ رَوَائِحُ التَّوَابِلِ الزَّكِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَمْتَزِجُ فِيهَا رَائِحَةُ الْقِرْفَةِ مَعَ الْبُخُورِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ.
sentences.translation: Kada posjetitelj luta njenim uskim prolazima, dočekuju ga mirisi prijatnih začina u kojima se miris cimeta miješa s tamjanom i šafranom.
sentences.translationEn: As the visitor wanders through its narrow aisles, they are greeted by the fragrant scents of spices, where the smell of cinnamon mixes with incense and saffron.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ ظَلَّتْ هَذِهِ الْأَمَاكِنُ مُحَافِظَةً عَلَى هُوِيَّتِهَا الْمِعْمَارِيَّةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ، مِمَّا يُضْفِي جَوًّا مِنَ السِّحْرِ وَالتَّارِيخِ عَلَى عَمَلِيَّةِ التَّسَوُّقِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova mjesta su zadržala svoj stari arhitektonski identitet, što svakodnevnom procesu kupovine daje atmosferu magije i historije.
sentences.translationEn: These places have maintained their ancient architectural identity, which adds an atmosphere of magic and history to the daily shopping process.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنَ الْمُلَاحَظِ أَنَّ اخْتِيَارَ الْمَوَادِّ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ الطَّازَجَةِ يَتَطَلَّبُ مَعْرِفَةً عَمِيقَةً بِالْمَوَاسِمِ وَالْأَنْوَاعِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ لِلْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ.
sentences.translation: Primjetno je da odabir svježih namirnica zahtijeva duboko poznavanje sezona i različitih vrsta povrća i voća.
sentences.translationEn: It is noteworthy that choosing fresh food materials requires deep knowledge of the seasons and different types of vegetables and fruits.

sentences.arabic: وَإِذَا مَا أَمْعَنَّا النَّظَرَ فِي دَوْرِ التَّاجِرِ، نَجِدُ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ بَائِعًا فَقَطْ، بَلْ هُوَ خَبِيرٌ يُقَدِّمُ النَّصَائِحَ حَوْلَ أَفْضَلِ طُرُقِ الطَّهْيِ.
sentences.translation: Ako pažljivo pogledamo ulogu trgovca, vidjet ćemo da on nije samo prodavač, već stručnjak koji daje savjete o najboljim načinima kuhanja.
sentences.translationEn: If we look closely at the role of the merchant, we find that he is not just a seller, but an expert who provides advice on the best cooking methods.

sentences.arabic: خِتَامًا، تَبْقَى هَذِهِ الْأَسْوَاقُ الشَّاهِدَ الْأَكْبَرَ عَلَى ثَرَاءِ الْمَطْبَخِ الْعَرَبِيِّ وَارْتِبَاطِهِ الْوَثِيقِ بِالْجُذُورِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, ove tržnice ostaju najveći svjedok bogatstva arapske kuhinje i njene bliske povezanosti s društvenim korijenima.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, these markets remain the greatest witness to the richness of Arab cuisine and its close connection to social roots.
